sourcesContent:
// Dashboard.js import React from 'react'; import './Dashboard.css'; function Dashboard({ dashboardData }) { if (!dashboardData) { return (

📊 Analytics Dashboard

Run an analysis to see results here

📈

No Analysis Data Available

Run an individual analysis or batch processing to view results in the dashboard.

); } const { individualResult, batchResult, timestamp, type, customerData } = dashboardData; // Mock data for the charts based on your screenshots const chartData = { churnRisk: 16.1, targetChurn: 133.06, tenure: 5.0, targetTenure: 44.4, daysSinceLastOrder: 7.0, targetDays: 40.6, satisfactionScore: 3.0, targetSatisfaction: 2.5, businessImpact: { estimatedCV: 16250, retentionBudget: 812, potentialLoss: 2624, roiPotential: 2.2 }, riskFactors: [ { factor: "Tenure", impact: 0.32 }, { factor: "Satisfaction Score", impact: 0.28 }, { factor: "Days Since Last Order", impact: 0.25 }, { factor: "Complaint History", impact: 0.22 }, { factor: "Cashback Amount", impact: 0.18 }, { factor: "Warehouse Distance", impact: 0.15 }, { factor: "Order Frequency", impact: 0.12 }, { factor: "Coupon Usage", impact: 0.10 } ] }; const renderIndividualAnalysis = () => { if (!individualResult) return null; const probability = individualResult.probability || chartData.churnRisk / 100; const prediction = individualResult.prediction || 0; const riskLevel = probability > 0.7 ? "high" : probability > 0.4 ? "medium" : "low"; const riskColors = { high: "#ef4444", medium: "#f59e0b", low: "#10b981" }; const riskLabels = { high: "HIGH RISK", medium: "MEDIUM RISK", low: "LOW RISK" }; const riskIcons = { high: "🚨", medium: "⚠️", low: "✅" }; return (
{/* Executive Summary */}

📋 Executive Summary

Analyzed: {timestamp}
✅

LOW RISK ({chartData.churnRisk}%)

Primary risk factor identified as Tenure.

This customer is currently evaluated at a {probability * 100}% churn probability and is categorized as stable and poses a low immediate risk. We recommend proceeding directly to the action plan below.

{/* Key Metrics Grid */}

Current Churn Risk

{chartData.churnRisk}%
vs Target: {chartData.targetChurn}% None

Customer Tenure

{chartData.tenure} mo
vs Target: {chartData.targetTenure}% None

Days Since Last Order

{chartData.daysSinceLastOrder} d
vs Target: {chartData.targetDays}% None

Satisfaction Score

{chartData.satisfactionScore}/5
vs Target: {chartData.targetSatisfaction}/5 None
{[1, 2, 3, 4, 5].map(star => ( ★ ))}
{/* Business Impact & Risk Score */}

💰 Business Impact Analysis

Estimated CLV ¥{chartData.businessImpact.estimatedCV.toLocaleString()}
Retention Budget ¥{chartData.businessImpact.retentionBudget}
Potential Loss ¥{chartData.businessImpact.potentialLoss}
ROI Potential {chartData.businessImpact.roiPotential}x

🎯 Predictive Risk Score

{chartData.churnRisk}%
{riskIcons[riskLevel]} Churn Risk – {riskLabels[riskLevel].split(' ')[0]}
{probability * 100}% Likelihood to Churn in the Next Quarter
{/* Key Churn Risk Factors */}

🔍 Key Churn Risk Factors

Top factors influencing churn probability
{chartData.riskFactors.map((factor, index) => (
{factor.factor} {Math.round(factor.impact * 100)}% Impact
))}
{/* Customer Retention Action Plan */}

🎯 Customer Retention Action Plan

🔄 Engagement Boost
  • Send personalized product recommendations
  • Offer exclusive early access to new arrivals
  • Create targeted email campaign series
💰 Incentive Strategy
  • Provide ¥{chartData.businessImpact.retentionBudget} retention budget allocation
  • Offer limited-time discount on next purchase
  • Increase cashback percentage for next 3 orders
📞 Proactive Outreach
  • Schedule satisfaction follow-up call
  • Assign dedicated account manager
  • Implement win-back campaign after 14 days
⏰ Recommended Timeline
1-3 Days Immediate engagement actions
1 Week Incentive deployment
2 Weeks Progress evaluation
{/* Customer Profile Summary */} {customerData && (

👤 Customer Profile Summary

Core Metrics
Tenure: {customerData.Tenure} months
Orders: {customerData.OrderCount}
Satisfaction: {customerData.SatisfactionScore}/5
Behavioral Data
Last Order: {customerData.DaySinceLastOrder} days ago
Cashback: ₹{customerData.CashbackAmount}
Complaint: {customerData.Complain ? 'Yes' : 'No'}
Preferences
Device: {customerData.PreferredLoginDevice}
Category: {customerData.PreferedOrderCat}
Payment: {customerData.PreferredPaymentMode}
)}
); }; const renderBatchAnalysis = () => { if (!batchResult) return null; return (

⚡ Batch Processing Results

Processed: {timestamp}
📊
{batchResult.total_records} Total Records
🚨
{batchResult.churn_count} Churn Cases
📈
{(batchResult.churn_rate * 100).toFixed(1)}% Churn Rate
); }; return (

📊 Analytics Dashboard

Comprehensive view of your churn risk analysis results

{type === 'individual' ? renderIndividualAnalysis() : renderBatchAnalysis()}
🔍

Run New Analysis

Perform individual customer churn prediction

⚡

Batch Processing

Analyze multiple customers at once

📋

View History

Access previous analysis results

); } export default Dashboard;
